name: Fluffy Out
author: Poki
description: Fluffy Out is a puzzle adventure game where you embark on a mission to save some cute, fluffy aliens. To guide them to their spaceship and get them home, you'll have to remove pins from the playing board so they can fall down. But watch out for lurking bombs! With hundreds of levels to conquer, each offering unique challenges, and a ton of fluffy aliens to unlock, there's always something to do. Can you get the fluffies home? How to play Fluffy Out? Use the mouse or tap the screen to remove the pins! Who created Fluffy Out? Fluffy Out was created by Seal Unicorn Games. Play our other games on Poki : Misland , Dual Cat and Rusher Crusher How can I play Fluffy Out for free? You can play Fluffy Out for free on Poki . Can I play Fluffy Out on mobile devices and desktop? Fluffy Out can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
